en: Six days before the Passover, Jesus therefore came to Bethany, where Lazarus was, whom Jesus had raised from the dead.
zh: 逾越節前六天，耶穌到了伯大尼，就是拉撒路所住的地方；耶穌曾經使這拉撒路從死人中復活。

en: So they gave a dinner for him there. Martha served, and Lazarus was one of those reclining with him at the table.
zh: 有人在那裡為耶穌預備了筵席。馬大在那裡侍候，拉撒路也和一些人與耶穌一同吃飯。

en: Mary therefore took a pound of expensive ointment made from pure nard, and anointed the feet of Jesus and wiped his feet with her hair. The house was filled with the fragrance of the perfume.
zh: 馬利亞拿了半公斤珍貴純正的哪噠香膏，抹耶穌的腳，又用自己的頭髮去擦；屋裡就滿了香膏的香氣。

en: But Judas Iscariot, one of his disciples (he who was about to betray him), said,
zh: 耶穌的一個門徒，就是那要出賣他的加略人猶大，說：

en: "Why was this ointment not sold for three hundred denarii and given to the poor?"
zh: “為甚麼不把這香膏賣三百銀幣，賙濟窮人呢？”

en: He said this, not because he cared about the poor, but because he was a thief, and having charge of the moneybag he used to help himself to what was put into it.
zh: 他說這話，並不是因為他關懷窮人，而是因為他是個賊，又帶著錢囊，常取其中所存的。

en: Jesus said, "Leave her alone, so that she may keep it for the day of my burial.
zh: 耶穌就說：“由她吧，這香膏是她留下來為我安葬的日子用的。

en: The poor you always have with you, but you do not always have me."
zh: 你們常常有窮人跟你們在一起，卻不常有我。”

en: When the large crowd of the Jews learned that Jesus was there, they came, not only on account of him but also to see Lazarus, whom he had raised from the dead.
zh: 有一大群猶太人知道耶穌在那裡，就都來了，然而他們不單是為了耶穌的緣故，也是要看看耶穌使他從死人中復活的拉撒路。

en: So the chief priests made plans to put Lazarus to death as well,
zh: 於是祭司長想把拉撒路也殺掉，

en: because on account of him many of the Jews were going away and believing in Jesus.
zh: 因為有許多猶太人為了拉撒路的緣故，離開他們，信了耶穌。

en: The next day the large crowd that had come to the feast heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem.
zh: 第二天，有一大群上來過節的人，聽見耶穌要來耶路撒冷，

en: So they took branches of palm trees and went out to meet him, crying out, "Hosanna! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord, even the King of Israel!"
zh: 就拿著棕樹枝出去迎接他，歡呼說： “和散那， 奉主名來的以色列王， 是應當稱頌的！”

en: And Jesus found a young donkey and sat on it, just as it is written,
zh: 耶穌找到一頭小驢，就騎在上面，正如經上所記的：

en: "Fear not, daughter of Zion; behold, your king is coming, sitting on a donkey's colt!"
zh: “錫安的居民哪，不要懼怕； 看哪，你的王來了， 他騎著小驢來了。”

en: His disciples did not understand these things at first, but when Jesus was glorified, then they remembered that these things had been written about him and had been done to him.
zh: 門徒起初不明白這些事，可是到耶穌得了榮耀以後，他們才想起這些話是指著他說的，並且人們果然向他這樣行了。

en: The crowd that had been with him when he called Lazarus out of the tomb and raised him from the dead continued to bear witness.
zh: 那些和耶穌在一起，看見他叫拉撒路從墳墓出來，又使他從死人中復活的群眾，都為這事作見證。

en: The reason why the crowd went to meet him was that they heard he had done this sign.
zh: 群眾因為聽見他行了這神蹟，就去迎接他。

en: So the Pharisees said to one another, "You see that you are gaining nothing. Look, the world has gone after him."
zh: 於是法利賽人彼此說：“你們看，你們都是徒勞無功，世人都去跟隨他了！”

en: Now among those who went up to worship at the feast were some Greeks.
zh: 上去過節作禮拜的人中，有些是希臘人。

en: So these came to Philip, who was from Bethsaida in Galilee, and asked him, "Sir, we wish to see Jesus."
zh: 他們來到加利利的伯賽大人腓力那裡，請求他，說：“先生，我們想見耶穌。”

en: Philip went and told Andrew; Andrew and Philip went and told Jesus.
zh: 腓力去告訴安得烈，安得烈就和腓力去告訴耶穌。

en: And Jesus answered them, "The hour has come for the Son of Man to be glorified.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“人子得榮耀的時候到了！

en: Truly, truly, I say to you, unless a grain of wheat falls into the earth and dies, it remains alone; but if it dies, it bears much fruit.
zh: 我實實在在告訴你們，一粒麥子若不落在地裡死了，仍舊是一粒；如果死了，就結出許多果實來。

en: Whoever loves his life loses it, and whoever hates his life in this world will keep it for eternal life.
zh: 愛惜自己生命的，就喪掉生命；在這世上恨惡自己生命的，必會保全生命到永遠。

en: If anyone serves me, he must follow me; and where I am, there will my servant be also. If anyone serves me, the Father will honor him.
zh: 如果有人服事我，就應當跟從我；我在哪裡，服事我的人也會在哪裡；如果有人服事我，我父必尊重他。

en: "Now is my soul troubled. And what shall I say? 'Father, save me from this hour'? But for this purpose I have come to this hour.
zh: “我現在心裡煩亂，我應該說甚麼呢？說‘父啊，救我脫離這時刻’嗎？然而我正是為了這個緣故來的，要面對這時刻。

en: Father, glorify your name." Then a voice came from heaven: "I have glorified it, and I will glorify it again."
zh: 父啊，願你榮耀你的名！”當時有聲音從天上來，說：“我已經榮耀了我的名，還要再榮耀。”

en: The crowd that stood there and heard it said that it had thundered. Others said, "An angel has spoken to him."
zh: 站在旁邊的群眾聽見了，就說：“打雷了。”另外有人說：“有天使對他說話。”

en: Jesus answered, "This voice has come for your sake, not mine.
zh: 耶穌說：“這聲音不是為了我，而是為了你們發出的。

en: Now is the judgment of this world; now will the ruler of this world be cast out.
zh: 現在是這世界受審判的時候了，現在這世界的王要被趕出去。

en: And I, when I am lifted up from the earth, will draw all people to myself."
zh: 我若從地上被舉起來，就要吸引萬人歸向我。”

en: He said this to show by what kind of death he was going to die.
zh: 他說這話，是指著自己將要怎樣死說的。

en: So the crowd answered him, "We have heard from the Law that the Christ remains forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?"
zh: 於是群眾對他說：“我們從律法上知道基督是永遠常存的，你怎麼說‘人子必須被舉起來’呢？這人子是誰呢？”

en: So Jesus said to them, "The light is among you for a little while longer. Walk while you have the light, lest darkness overtake you. The one who walks in the darkness does not know where he is going.
zh: 耶穌說：“光在你們中間的時間不多了。你們應當趁著有光的時候行走，免得黑暗追上你們。在黑暗中行走的人，不知道往哪裡去。

en: While you have the light, believe in the light, that you may become sons of light." When Jesus had said these things, he departed and hid himself from them.
zh: 你們應當趁著有光的時候信從這光，使你們成為光明的兒女。” 耶穌說完了這些話，就離開他們隱藏起來。

en: Though he had done so many signs before them, they still did not believe in him,
zh: 耶穌在他們面前行了許多神蹟，但是他們仍然不信他。

en: so that the word spoken by the prophet Isaiah might be fulfilled: "Lord, who has believed what he heard from us, and to whom has the arm of the Lord been revealed?"
zh: 這是要應驗以賽亞先知所說的話： “主啊，我們所傳的，有誰信呢？ 主的膀臂向誰顯露呢？”

en: Therefore they could not believe. For again Isaiah said,
zh: 他們不能相信，因為以賽亞又說：

en: "He has blinded their eyes and hardened their heart, lest they see with their eyes, and understand with their heart, and turn, and I would heal them."
zh: “ 神使他們瞎了眼，硬了心， 免得他們眼睛看見， 心裡明白而回轉過來； 我就醫好他們。”

en: Isaiah said these things because he saw his glory and spoke of him.
zh: 以賽亞說這些話，是因為看見了他的榮耀，就指著他說的。

en: Nevertheless, many even of the authorities believed in him, but for fear of the Pharisees they did not confess it, so that they would not be put out of the synagogue;
zh: 雖然這樣，官長當中也有許多人信了耶穌。但是因為法利賽人的緣故，他們不敢公開承認，免得被趕出會堂；

en: for they loved the glory that comes from man more than the glory that comes from God.
zh: 因為他們愛來自人的榮耀，過於愛來自 神的榮耀。

en: And Jesus cried out and said, "Whoever believes in me, believes not in me but in him who sent me.
zh: 耶穌大聲說：“信我的，不單是信我，也是信那差我來的。

en: And whoever sees me sees him who sent me.
zh: 看見我的，就是看見那差我來的。

en: I have come into the world as light, so that whoever believes in me may not remain in darkness.
zh: 我是光，我到世上來，叫所有信我的不住在黑暗裡。

en: If anyone hears my words and does not keep them, I do not judge him; for I did not come to judge the world but to save the world.
zh: 人若聽見我的話卻不遵守的，我不審判他，因為我來不是要審判世人，而是要拯救世人。

en: The one who rejects me and does not receive my words has a judge; the word that I have spoken will judge him on the last day.
zh: 棄絕我又不接受我的話的人，自有審判他的。我所講的道在末日要定他的罪；

en: For I have not spoken on my own authority, but the Father who sent me has himself given me a commandment- what to say and what to speak.
zh: 因為我沒有憑著自己說話，而是差我來的父給了我命令，要我說甚麼，講甚麼。

en: And I know that his commandment is eternal life. What I say, therefore, I say as the Father has told me."
zh: 我知道他的命令就是永生。所以，我所講的，正是父吩咐我要我講的。”
